creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
significantly reduced recurrence after this:

From 407fdc14de0c738902d362f3c52c6503d6fbc968 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Andrew Turner <andrew@fubar.geek.nz>
Date: Wed, 27 Apr 2022 10:54:26 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] Stop using the kmem for PCPU memory on arm64


but still happening, around 1/40 times on a 16-core box:

Release APs...Trying to mount root from zfs:zroot/ROOT/13.1-RC4-20220427.111639 []...
done
spin lock 0xffff0000430f3100 (sched lock 2) held by 0xffffa000028c0580 (tid 100005) too long
timeout stopping cpus
panic: spin lock held too long
cpuid = 3
time = 1
KDB: stack backtrace:
#0 0xffff000000516268 at kdb_backtrace+0x60
#1 0xffff0000004c22bc at vpanic+0x174
#2 0xffff0000004c2144 at panic+0x44
#3 0xffff000000499bb0 at _mtx_lock_indefinite_check+0x88
#4 0xffff000000499730 at _mtx_lock_spin_cookie+0xb8
#5 0xffff0000004f7344 at sched_switch+0xccc
#6 0xffff0000004d0694 at mi_switch+0x100
#7 0xffff0000004f95e8 at sched_bind+0x6c
#8 0xffff000000514128 at taskqgroup_binder+0x64
#9 0xffff000000514c50 at gtaskqueue_run_locked+0x17c
#10 0xffff0000005147a8 at gtaskqueue_thread_loop+0x130
#11 0xffff000000472128 at fork_exit+0x88
#12 0xffff0000007f3484 at fork_trampoline+0x14
